calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-04-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:20 am
Judge Pro Tem Glen Lerner, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Jose Ortega, appears in pro per with a friend who helps with translation. Respondent, Jilma Marshall appears with counsel Thomas J. Feeney. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Lerner.

EXHA (1) 2 page brief
EXHA (2) 1 page diagram of intersection

Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
9:46am

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Judgment Entered
